query: Clacton by-election August 2026 Nigel Farage candidates contesting - which parties standing aside, who is running against him, full candidate list
answer:
I've completed comprehensive research on the 2026 Clacton by-election. Here's a summary of the key findings:

## Summary

**The By-Election:** Scheduled for **Thursday 13 August 2026**, triggered by Nigel Farage's resignation (announced 7 July, formalized 8 July 2026) amid a Standards Commissioner investigation into an allegedly undeclared £5m gift. Farage is re-contesting for Reform UK. Nominations close 4pm, 17 July.

**Parties standing aside (boycotting):** Conservatives, Labour, Liberal Democrats, Greens, and Restore Britain — all framing it as a "vanity"/"fake" by-election to distract from the standards case. This leaves **Count Binface as the widely described "main challenger."**

**Candidate list** (12 named by Democracy Club; ~15 intended per PollCheck, as nominations hadn't closed):
1. Nigel Farage — Reform UK
2. Count Binface — Count Binface Party
3. Laurence Fox — Reclaim Party
4. Adham Alkhatip — Forward Party
5. Kai Stephens — British Democratic Party
6. Piers Corbyn — Independent
7. Mr Fishfinger — Independent
8. Rob Pownall — Independent
9. Luke Worley — Independent
10. Remus Bell — Independent
11. Marc Berger — Independent
12. Rees Cowne — Independent

Plus PollCheck-named entities: Climate Party, Rejoin EU, Monster Raving Loony Party, Ollie Granger (Ind), Robert Elwes (Ind). **Amelia Randall (Balanced Britain Party) withdrew** on 10 July.

**Polling/expectations:** No constituency by-election poll exists yet — all polling is national attitude data. Ipsos found 33% of Britons would prefer Count Binface to win vs 21% for Farage in a forced choice (not a Clacton vote). Farage's 2024 baseline was 46.2% (majority 8,405), and PollCheck's seat model projects Reform near 60%. Given the boycott, analysts frame the contest as being about turnout and margin size rather than the outcome.

**Note:** I flagged one data limitation — AskNews was unavailable (quota/billing limits), so I relied on PollCheck, Democracy Club, Wikipedia, and pollster primary sources, which cross-validated well.

sources.title: Clacton By-Election: 13 August 2026 - Polls & Candidates | PollCheck
sources.snippet: Fifteen candidates have said they will stand, including Farage (Reform UK), Count Binface, Reclaim's Laurence Fox, the Climate Party, the British Democratic Party (Kai Stephens), the Forward Party (Adham Alkhatip) and Piers Corbyn. Every other main party is boycotting the contest.

sources.title: UK Parliament elections: The candidates in Clacton (Democracy Club)
sources.snippet: 12 candidates listed: Adham Alkhatip (Forward Party), Remus Bell (Ind), Marc Berger (Ind), Count Binface, Piers Corbyn (Ind), Rees Cowne (Ind), Nigel Farage (Reform UK), Mr Fishfinger (Ind), Laurence Fox (Reclaim), Rob Pownall (Ind), Kai Stephens (British Democratic Party), Luke Worley (Ind).

sources.title: 2026 Clacton by-election - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: The Labour Party, the Conservative Party, the Liberal Democrats, the Green Party and Restore Britain have said they will not contest the by-election, leaving the novelty candidate Count Binface as the main challenger to Farage.

sources.title: British public more likely to prefer Count Binface wins Clacton by-election than Nigel Farage | Ipsos
sources.snippet: 1 in 3 British adults (33%) would prefer Count Binface to win, giving him a 12ppt lead over Farage (21%). 32% say neither. 13% don't know.

sources.title: Snap poll: Britons tend to oppose Nigel Farage by-election | YouGov
sources.snippet: New snap YouGov poll finds most think Farage has been dishonest about his finances; Britons oppose the by-election.

sources.title: Britain is skeptical of Farage's Clacton by-election, but Reform supporters aren't | Prolific
sources.snippet: 69% said other parties should stand candidates against Farage; investigation concerns an undeclared £5 million gift from crypto investor Christopher Harborne.

sources.title: Poll date of 13 August confirmed for Clacton by-election after Farage MP resignation | ITV News Anglia
sources.snippet: Poll date of 13 August confirmed for Clacton by-election.
